sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110264" key="fantasiasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαντᾰσι-αστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n110264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who is fond of display,</tr_> cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
